meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve tutorial hell (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome tutorial hell. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Stop building tutorials and start shipping SaaS. Learn how to implement effective user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert case study.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop watching and start shipping. By implementing a focused, goal-oriented user onboarding flow, you bridge the gap between product discovery and user retention. Use Antigravity to scaffold your architecture and Claude Code to automate the heavy lifting, turning passive viewers into paying customers immediately.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks consuming tutorials, yet your codebase remains a graveyard of half-baked features. The cycle is addictive: watch, copy, break, repeat. Meanwhile, your potential users are drifting away because your product lacks the one thing that actually drives revenue: a clear, frictionless path to value.

Real founders don't build tutorials; they build onboarding experiences. The secret isn't more documentation—it's guiding the user from 'sign-up' to 'Aha! moment' in under sixty seconds. We are shifting from the consumer mindset to the architect mindset, leveraging AI-driven tooling to bypass the noise and ship a production-ready onboarding flow that converts.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the single metric that proves your user found value. This is the destination for your onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS architect. Define a 3-step onboarding flow for a B2B productivity tool where the 'Aha' moment is generating a PDF report. Map the user journey from signup to report generation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a checklist of the 3 essential steps to reach the Aha moment for my SaaS'

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding UI
steps.description: Create a lean, modal-based walkthrough that forces engagement without cluttering the main dashboard.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React component for a multi-step onboarding modal using Tailwind CSS. It should include progress bars and a call-to-action button for each step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'generate onboarding-modal.tsx with Tailwind and Framer Motion'

steps.title: Implement Progress Tracking
steps.description: Store onboarding state in your database to ensure users can resume exactly where they left off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a schema for a 'user_onboarding_state' table in PostgreSQL that tracks current_step, is_completed, and last_active_at.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema for user onboarding state tracking'

steps.title: Automate User Contextualization
steps.description: Use AI to personalize the onboarding based on the user's initial input during sign-up.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a service function that takes user role input and dynamically updates the onboarding checklist content.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'create personalize-onboarding.ts service to handle dynamic task assignment'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Push your onboarding flow to production and measure drop-off rates at each step using analytics.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a snippet to integrate PostHog event tracking for each button click within the onboarding modal.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add posthog tracking events to onboarding-modal.tsx'

pro_tips: Never ask for a credit card during onboarding; focus entirely on the value-delivery loop first.
Use 'Empty States' as onboarding opportunities—if the dashboard is empty, show a button to generate the first asset.
Keep onboarding under 3 steps. If it takes longer, your product is likely trying to do too much.
Implement a 'Skip' button. Forcing power users through a tutorial is a guaranteed way to increase churn.
A/B test your onboarding CTA copy; even a slight change in wording can increase conversions by 15%.
content.next_steps: Now that your onboarding is live, analyze your drop-off rates and iterate on the copy of your weakest step to improve conversion.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your users bounce because they don't know where to start. Implement this flow, track your results, and iterate until your onboarding becomes your greatest sales asset. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
